headline_seed: Top Democrats call on Graham Platner to drop out as sexual assault allegation emerges - CBS News
draft_text:
Top Democrats including Schumer and Gillibrand told Graham Platner to exit Maine's Senate race Monday. The DSCC said it will not invest if he stays on the ballot. Platner's withdrawal deadline: July 13. Politico and CBS News both report the story.

And that's the mews.
